004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.HtmlBuilder.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.util.Map;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.response.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
032
033/**
034 * Shows contents of the microservice configuration file.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauMicroserviceBasics">juneau-microservice Basics</a>
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * @serial exclude
041 */
042@Rest(
043   path="/config",
044   title="Configuration",
045   description="Contents of configuration file."
046)
047@HtmlDocConfig(
048   navlinks={
049      "up: request:/..",
050      "api: servlet:/api",
051      "stats: servlet:/stats",
052      "edit: servlet:/edit"
053   },
054   resolveBodyVars="true"
055)
056public class ConfigResource extends BasicRestServlet {
057   @Response
058   @Schema(description = "Section not found.")
059   @SuppressWarnings({
060      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for microservice hierarchy
061   })
062   private class SectionNotFound extends NotFound {
063      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
064
065      /** Constructor. */
066      SectionNotFound() {
067         super("Section not found.");
068      }
069   }
070
071   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
072
073   @RestGet(
074      path="/",
075      summary="Get config file contents",
076      description="Show contents of config file as a JsonMap.",
077      swagger=@OpSwagger(
078         responses={
079            "200:{ description:'Config file as a map of map of objects.', example:{'':{defaultKey:'defaultValue'},'Section1':{key1:'val1',key2:123}}}"
080         }
081      )
082   )
083   /**
084    * Returns the config file contents as a nested map.
085    *
086    * @return The config as a map of maps.
087    */
088   public JsonMap getConfig() {
089      return getContext().getConfig().toMap();
090   }
091
092   @RestGet(
093      path="/edit",
094      summary="Render form entry page for editing config file",
095      description="Renders a form entry page for editing the raw text of a config file."
096   )
097   /**
098    * Returns an HTML form for editing the config file contents.
099    *
100    * @return The edit form.
101    */
102   public Form getConfigEditForm() {
103      return form().id("form").action("servlet:/").method("POST").enctype("application/x-www-form-urlencoded").children(
104         div().class_("data").children(
105            table(
106               tr(td().style("text-align:right").children(button("submit","Submit"),button("reset","Reset"))),
107               tr(th().child("Contents")),
108               tr(th().child(
109                  textarea().name("contents").rows(40).cols(120).style("white-space:pre;word-wrap:normal;overflow-x:scroll;font-family:monospace;")
110                     .text(getContext().getConfig().toString()))
111               )
112            )
113         )
114      );
115   }
116
117   @RestGet(
118      path="/{section}/{key}",
119      summary="Get config file entry value",
120      description="Show value of config file entry as a simple string.",
121      swagger=@OpSwagger(
122         responses={
123            "200:{ description:'Entry value.', example:'servlet:/htdocs/themes/dark.css'}"
124         }
125      )
126   )
127   /**
128    * Returns the value of a config entry for the given section and key.
129    *
130    * @param section Section name in config file.
131    * @param key Key name in section.
132    * @return The entry value.
133    * @throws SectionNotFound If the section is not found.
134    */
135   public String getConfigEntry(
136         @Path("section") @Schema(d="Section name in config file.") String section,
137         @Path("key") @Schema(d="Key name in section.") String key
138      ) throws SectionNotFound {
139
140      return getSection(section).getString(key);
141   }
142
143   @RestGet(
144      path="/{section}",
145      summary="Get config file section contents",
146      description="Show contents of config file section as a JsonMap.",
147      swagger=@OpSwagger(
148         responses={
149            "200:{ description:'Config file section as a map of objects.', example:{key1:'val1',key2:123}}"
150         }
151      )
152   )
153   /**
154    * Returns the contents of a config section as a map.
155    *
156    * @param section Section name in config file.
157    * @return The section as a map.
158    * @throws SectionNotFound If the section is not found.
159    */
160   public JsonMap getConfigSection(
161         @Path("section") @Schema(d="Section name in config file.") String section
162      ) throws SectionNotFound {
163
164      return getSection(section);
165   }
166
167   @RestPut(
168      path="/",
169      summary="Update config file contents",
170      description="Update the contents of the config file from raw text.",
171      swagger=@OpSwagger(
172         responses={
173            "200:{ description:'Config file section as a map of objects.', example:{key1:'val1',key2:123}}"
174         }
175      )
176   )
177   /**
178    * Updates the config file from raw text in INI format.
179    *
180    * @param contents New contents in INI file format.
181    * @return The config as a map.
182    * @throws Exception If parsing or loading fails.
183    */
184   @SuppressWarnings({
185      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
186   })
187   public JsonMap setConfigContents(
188         @Content @Schema(d="New contents in INI file format.") Reader contents
189      ) throws Exception {
190
191      return getContext().getConfig().load(contents, true).toMap();
192   }
193
194   @RestPost(
195      path="/",
196      summary="Update config file contents",
197      description="Update the contents of the config file from a FORM post.",
198      swagger=@OpSwagger(
199         responses={
200            "200:{ description:'Config file section as a map of objects.', example:{key1:'val1',key2:123}}"
201         }
202      )
203   )
204   /**
205    * Updates the config file from form POST data.
206    *
207    * @param contents New contents in INI file format.
208    * @return The config as a map.
209    * @throws Exception If parsing or loading fails.
210    */
211   @SuppressWarnings({
212      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
213   })
214   public JsonMap setConfigContentsFormPost(
215         @FormData("contents") @Schema(d="New contents in INI file format.") String contents
216      ) throws Exception {
217
218      return setConfigContents(new StringReader(contents));
219   }
220
221   @RestPut(
222      path="/{section}",
223      summary="Update config section contents",
224      description="Add or overwrite a config file section.",
225      swagger=@OpSwagger(
226         responses={
227            "200:{ description:'Config file section as a map of objects.', example:{key1:'val1',key2:123}}"
228         }
229      )
230   )
231   /**
232    * Adds or overwrites a config section.
233    *
234    * @param section Section name in config file.
235    * @param contents New contents of config section as a simple map of key/value pairs.
236    * @return The updated section as a map.
237    * @throws Exception If the update fails.
238    */
239   @SuppressWarnings({
240      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
241   })
242   public JsonMap setConfigSection(
243         @Path("section") @Schema(d="Section name in config file.") String section,
244         @Content @Schema(d="New contents of config section as a simple map of key/value pairs.")
245         Map<String,Object> contents
246      ) throws Exception {
247
248      getContext().getConfig().setSection(section, null, contents);
249      return getSection(section);
250   }
251   @RestPut(
252      path="/{section}/{key}",
253      summary="Update config entry value",
254      description="Add or overwrite a config file entry.",
255      swagger=@OpSwagger(
256         responses={
257            "200:{ description:'The updated value.', example:'servlet:/htdocs/themes/dark.css'}"
258         }
259      )
260   )
261   /**
262    * Adds or overwrites a config entry value.
263    *
264    * @param section Section name in config file.
265    * @param key Key name in section.
266    * @param value New value for entry.
267    * @return The updated value.
268    * @throws SectionNotFound If the section is not found.
269    */
270   public String setConfigValue(
271         @Path("section") @Schema(d="Section name in config file.") String section,
272         @Path("key") @Schema(d="Key name in section.") String key,
273         @Content @Schema(d="New value for entry.") String value
274      ) throws SectionNotFound {
275
276      getContext().getConfig().set(section + '/' + key, value);
277      return getSection(section).getString(key);
278   }
279
280   private JsonMap getSection(String name) throws SectionNotFound {
281      return getContext().getConfig().getSection(name).asMap().orElseThrow(SectionNotFound::new);
282   }
283}
